title: USB Flow Samples
content: A set of UX documentation and flow maps I put together for US Bancorp. The work covered error handling — mapping out client-side and server-side failure states, the UI responses for each, and how users get unblocked. I also mapped onboarding flows and design system planning diagrams to keep the broader team aligned on structure and decisions.

images.caption: Error Handling Flow: A flowchart mapping client-side (4xx) and server-side (5xx) error states with color-coded decision branches — red for errors, green for success, yellow for warnings. Each path leads to a UI example with a specific error message, corrective action, and supporting iconography.

Design System Planning Flow: Planning documentation for the component library — style maps for buttons, modals, and inputs across primary, secondary, and floating variants, plus dark and light mode theming. Step-by-step diagrams track system integration decisions and include notes on the reasoning behind key calls.

User Flow Mapping: Diagrams covering the "New to Digital" setup process alongside key mid-journey flows like Autopay and Add Authorized User. Dedicated sections handle extended failure states with annotated fallback paths.
